# ::: "{{< fa brain size=normalsize >}}" ``` ### Professional Background ::: columns ::: {.column width="100%" .custom-spacing} - ***Data Science:*** \ Statistical programming; Interactive dashboard design;
- ***Data Engineering:*** \ End-to-end ETL data pipeline design & automation; Dataset transformations;
- ***Data Management:*** \ Data centralization and governance; High-performance computing clusters;
- ***Clinical Trials:*** \ Drug and behavioral interventions in Psychiatry;
- ***Neuroimaging:*** \ Magnetic Resonance Imaging analysis of the human brain. ::: ::: ### Programming & Tools ::: columns ::: {.column width="46%"} \ \ R \ (tidyverse, targets, Shiny) \ \
\ \ Python (pandas, nibabel, scikit-learn)
![](images/matlab_icon2){.absolute .matlab-icon width="14"} \ \ MATLAB ::: ::: {.column width="36%"} {{< fa terminal size=xs >}} \ \ Shell Scripting (Bash, zsh)
\ \ Git
\ Docker
::: ::: {.column width="12%"} - **XNAT**
- **FlyWheel**
- **FSL** ::: ::: ### Experience ::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](images/usc-shield-red.png){.absolute width="50"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} **Keck School of Medicine of USC, Los Angeles CA**
Programmer Analyst I, *Laboratory of NeuroImaging* `Jun 2026 - Present`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px;"} - [LASI-DAD](https://lasi-dad.org/): Impact of dementia and Alzheimer's disease in the brain in low/middle-income countries (e.g. India) which are understudied in this research field. Resource Employee, *Laboratory of NeuroImaging*`Jun 2025 - May 2026`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px;"} - Built and maintained a secure Linux-based research server. - Centralized multi-site MRI data by deploying and managing an XNAT instance, supporting data governance, querying, and analysis. ::: ::: ::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](images/chla_logo.png){.absolute width="45"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} **Children's Hospital Los Angeles, Los Angeles CA** `Jun 2025 - May 2026`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: -10px;"}
Research Assistant, *Computational Imaging of Brain Organization Research Group* - [UNITY](https://www.unity-mri.com/): Develop tools to measure infant neurodevelopment from low-cost, portable, ultra-low field MRI scanners. - Developed automated, containerized (Docker) neuroimaging preprocessing pipelines. - Generated analysis-ready brain MRI datasets for interpretation of neuroimaging signals and machine learning and statistical analyses. - Quality control of raw MRI data, cleaned datasets, analyses, and reporting. ::: ::: ::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](images/mgh_logo.png){.absolute width="45"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} `Oct 2022 - Jul 2024`{style="float: right; font-size: 12px"} **Massachusetts General Hospital, Boston MA**
Programmer, *Center for Addiction Medicine* - Designed and maintained end-to-end ETL data pipelines (with Git), generating clean datasets and statistical results for a drug intervention clinical trial. - Developed dashboards to monitor data, identify missing or inconsistent data, and improve visualization of summary statistics. - EDC research database (REDCap) management; automating data extraction via API integration. - Compiled and harmonized longitudinal datasets and metadata to enable cross-cohort analysis. ::: ::: ::: columns ::: {.column width="9%"} ![](images/barilan_logo.png){.absolute width="45"} ::: ::: {.column width="91%"} **Bar-Ilan University, Tel-Aviv - Israel** `Aug 2020 - Dec 2020`{style="float: right;"}
Research Intern, *Developmental Neuropsychology Lab*
- Data processing, cleaning, and analysis for eye-tracking data to measure EEG and gaze coordination patterns using repeated measures ANOVA. ::: :::
